headline: 4X Community Series, $500K cargo challenge, free World Cup jersey
quickTake: Best grind: Community Mission Series at 4X — finishing all 7 adds a GTA$500,000 bonus
Easy objective: sell GTA$500,000 of Special Cargo for a GTA$500,000 bonus
Collectibles week: Treasure Chests pay 4X, Hidden Caches 3X
Free claim: Los Santos Soccer Jersey — just log in (World Cup 2026)

beginnerPath.label: Run the Community Mission Series at 4X — easy access from the Jobs menu, and all 7 missions pay an extra GTA$500,000.
Log in this week to claim the free Los Santos Soccer Jersey.
Diving for Treasure Chests? They pay 4X this week — free money with zero setup.
Executive Offices are 40% off (from about GTA$600K) — a solid first step into CEO work if you can afford it.
Skip the discounted sports cars until you own your first money-making property.

locations.name: Start from the pause menu
locations.note: Pause Menu → Online → Jobs → Community Series. Complete all 7 for the GTA$500,000 bonus.

locations.name: Your Special Cargo Warehouse
locations.note: Sell GTA$500,000 of crates via your Executive Office computer. Requires a CEO Office + warehouse.

locations.name: Dynasty 8 Executive (in-game site)
locations.note: Buy via the in-game browser. Unlocks CEO work and Special Cargo.

locations.name: The Diamond Casino & Resort
locations.note: Spin the Lucky Wheel once per day.

locations.name: LS Car Meet
locations.note: Win an LS Car Meet Series race to claim it.

locations.name: Underwater spawns
locations.area: Around the map and Cayo Perico
locations.note: Two chests spawn daily. Bring scuba gear or a Toreador.

locations.name: Gun Van (rotating spot)
locations.note: Van icon appears on the map once you are close or check daily.

locations.name: LSIA II
locations.note: Purple stopwatch icon on the map.

locations.name: Ron Alternates to Elysian Island
locations.area: Starts at the Ron Alternates Wind Farm
locations.note: Requires an HSW-upgraded vehicle (PS5 / Series X|S / PC Enhanced).

locations.name: At the Races
locations.area: Enter via the yellow corona or Quick Job menu
locations.note: Premium entry fee, top 3 win big.
